title: Month-End Close: Bank, AR, AP & Credit Card Reconciliation
description: Automate your monthly reconciliations by teaching Claude to match transactions and flag discrepancies.

steps.title: Create a 'Reconcile Bank' skill
steps.content: Write a markdown skill that takes your bank statement (CSV or PDF) and GL bank activity, then matches transactions automatically. Tell Claude to flag unmatched items, timing differences, and outstanding checks.

steps.title: Extend to AR, AP, and credit cards
steps.content: Duplicate the pattern for accounts receivable (match invoices to payments), accounts payable (match bills to payments), and credit card statements. Each gets its own skill file with account-specific matching rules.

steps.title: Build in tie-out checks
steps.content: Require every reconciliation output to include a cover sheet showing: beginning balance, activity, ending balance, and the reconciling difference. The difference must be zero or explained. Claude should refuse to mark a reconciliation complete if it doesn't tie.
